name: mern-ideate
description: A full-stack notes application built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js). This project allows users to create, read, update, and delete notes with a clean, responsive interface.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
